name: Parking Hazards
author: Poki
description: Parking Hazards is a parking game that puts your precision and control to the ultimate test! Drive cars and park them in line without crashing, but beware – it’s not as easy as it sounds! Navigate through explosive oil barrels waiting to go boom, sneaky flame throwers ready to char, slippery oil slicks that can send you spinning, unpredictable speed boosts, and the ever-changing paths of moving platforms and bridges. Can you fill up every parking spot in these increasingly hazardous parking lots? How to play Parking Hazards? WASD or the arrow keys to move Who created Parking Hazards? Parking Hazards is created by TheBdrive. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Parking Hazards for free? You can play Parking Hazards for free on Poki. Can I play Parking Hazards on mobile devices and desktop? Parking Hazards can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
